# Preferences Template

```yaml
# Superpowers Workflow Preferences
# Auto-generated by the onboarding wizard.
# Edit manually or ask the agent to update.

workflow:
  auto_commit: <true|false>
  confirm_destructive_actions: <true|false>

communication:
  language: <language-code>

# Platform-specific settings.
# The `copilot:` section is silently ignored by Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.
# rubber_duck: true forces Rubber Duck at every critical checkpoint.
# rubber_duck: false (default) uses Copilot CLI's native invocation behavior.
copilot:
  rubber_duck: false
```
